name: Executable File Created by another Executable
notes:
This rule triggers when an executable is created by another executable.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: frack113
SIGMA Title: Creation of an Executable by an Executable
SIGMA Description: Detects the creation of an executable by another executable


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Created, System.Successful File Modification
when the event matches File Extension (custom) is any of exe

when the event matches ((LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Windows\System32\msiexec.exe' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Windows\system32\cleanmgr.exe' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Windows\explorer.exe' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\WINDOWS\system32\dxgiadaptercache.exe' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\WINDOWS\system32\Dism.exe' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Windows\System32\wuauclt.exe') OR (LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\WINDOWS\system32\svchost.exe' AND LOWER("File Directory") LIKE 'C:\Windows\SoftwareDistribution\Download\%') OR (LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE'C:\Windows\system32\svchost.exe' AND (LOWER("File Directory") LIKE '%:\WUDownloadCache\%' AND LOWER("Filename") LIKE '%WindowsUpdateBox.exe%')) OR (LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\WINDOWS\SoftwareDistribution\Download\%' AND LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%WindowsUpdateBox.Exe' AND LOWER("File Directory") LIKE 'C:\$WINDOWS.~BT\Sources\%') OR (LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Windows\WinSxS\%' AND LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%TiWorker.exe') OR ((LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Application Files\%' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Application Files (x86)\%') OR (LOWER("File Directory") LIKE 'C:\Application Files\%' OR LOWER("File Directory") LIKE 'C:\Application Files (x86)\%')) OR (LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\ProgramData\Microsoft\Windows Defender\%' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Application Files\Windows Defender\%') OR LOWER("File Directory") LIKE '%\Microsoft\WindowsApps\%' OR (LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\AppData\Local\Microsoft\Teams\Update.exe' AND (LOWER("File Directory") LIKE '%\AppData\Local\Microsoft\Teams\stage\Teams.exe' OR LOWER("File Directory") LIKE '%\AppData\Local\Microsoft\Teams\stage\Squirrel.exe' OR LOWER("File Directory") LIKE '%\AppData\Local\Microsoft\SquirrelTemp\tempb\')) OR (LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Windows\Microsoft.NET\Framework\%' AND LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%mscorsvw.exe' AND LOWER("File Directory") LIKE 'C:\Windows\assembly\NativeImages_%') OR (LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\AppData\Local\%' AND LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\Microsoft VS Code\Code.exe' AND LOWER("File Directory") LIKE '%\.vscode\extensions\%') OR (LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop\Update.exe' AND LOWER("File Directory") LIKE '%\AppData\Local\SquirrelTemp\%') OR LOWER("File Directory") LIKE 'C:\WINDOWS\TEMP\%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Executable File Created by another Executable on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Created, System.Successful File Modification
AND when the event matches File Extension (custom) is any of exe

AND NOT when the event matches ((LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Windows\System32\msiexec.exe' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Windows\system32\cleanmgr.exe' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Windows\explorer.exe' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\WINDOWS\system32\dxgiadaptercache.exe' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\WINDOWS\system32\Dism.exe' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Windows\System32\wuauclt.exe') OR (LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\WINDOWS\system32\svchost.exe' AND LOWER("File Directory") LIKE 'C:\Windows\SoftwareDistribution\Download\%') OR (LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE'C:\Windows\system32\svchost.exe' AND (LOWER("File Directory") LIKE '%:\WUDownloadCache\%' AND LOWER("Filename") LIKE '%WindowsUpdateBox.exe%')) OR (LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\WINDOWS\SoftwareDistribution\Download\%' AND LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%WindowsUpdateBox.Exe' AND LOWER("File Directory") LIKE 'C:\$WINDOWS.~BT\Sources\%')  OR (LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Windows\WinSxS\%' AND LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%TiWorker.exe') OR ((LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Application Files\%' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Application Files (x86)\%') OR (LOWER("File Directory") LIKE 'C:\Application Files\%' OR LOWER("File Directory") LIKE 'C:\Application Files (x86)\%'))  OR (LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\ProgramData\Microsoft\Windows Defender\%' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Application Files\Windows Defender\%') OR LOWER("File Directory") LIKE '%\Microsoft\WindowsApps\%' OR (LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\AppData\Local\Microsoft\Teams\Update.exe' AND (LOWER("File Directory") LIKE '%\AppData\Local\Microsoft\Teams\stage\Teams.exe' OR LOWER("File Directory") LIKE '%\AppData\Local\Microsoft\Teams\stage\Squirrel.exe' OR LOWER("File Directory") LIKE '%\AppData\Local\Microsoft\SquirrelTemp\tempb\')) OR (LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Windows\Microsoft.NET\Framework\%' AND LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%mscorsvw.exe' AND LOWER("File Directory") LIKE 'C:\Windows\assembly\NativeImages_%')  OR (LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\AppData\Local\%' AND LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\Microsoft VS Code\Code.exe' AND LOWER("File Directory") LIKE '%\.vscode\extensions\%') OR (LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop\Update.exe' AND LOWER("File Directory") LIKE '%\AppData\Local\SquirrelTemp\%') OR LOWER("File Directory") LIKE 'C:\WINDOWS\TEMP\%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Executable File Created by another Executable
Event description: Detects when an executable is created by another executable.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
